query:
-- Get the actual customer IDs from the unmatched services
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.customerExternalId, c.name as customerName
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.externalId IN ('SKSZDDG', 'SEJX1FL', 'SD5S22R', 'SVFZ32A', 'SNCXJ3U', 'SG3D608', 'SB3PFMC');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.customerExternalId, c.name as customerName
